title: Parents and Children - Canada.ca
content:
## Parents and Children
We all worry about our children, and with the extensive amount of information available on the Internet, it is sometimes hard to find reliable facts.
A joint publication of Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada, It's Your Health ( IYH ) is a series of over 150 articles on a wide range of health and safety issues. From toy safety to vaccination information, these articles give you the reliable information you need to make healthy and safe decisions for you and your children.
To view all the articles available go to the complete alphabetical list or subscribe to IYH to be notified electronically whenever an article is updated or a new article is released. Subscribe now .
- Clinical Trials and Drug Safety
- Tanning and your health
